response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and direct exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X; their background is predominantly in web/mobile stacks with DLang, TypeScript, and Node.js, with no evidence of firmware, switch hardware, or embedded security domain experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across diverse languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to work in complex, distributed systems and DevOps environments
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C in UNIX embedded systems or Linux kernel modification
Lacks native Japanese proficiency — a hard requirement for the role
No evidence of exposure to embedded networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
